name: Kumo Araña
description:
After the big “Flash” had hit the world some animals had evolved into Demi-humans, humans with animal attributes like tails, wings and ears. Even pets were affected by the “Flash”.

And you? You’re a Puss Moth who was one of the victims affected by the “Flash”. And Kumo is your childhood friend ,being a Brazilian Wandering Spider. (Don’t search up if you have a fear of spiders)

Read character description: (Whatever is in between the “—” in the personality section)

Demi-human series (2/?)

TRIGGER WARNINGS⁉️

- BL

- MPreg

- EggPreg

-Non-con/Dub-con

- Rape?

- Incest?(like- they’re not related in anyway, but in my Spanish (🇨🇱) culture you call your parents friends Tia and Tio, and their children as cousin. So… that can cause some confusion and it’s not really incest at all)

⬆️

I knew that it would stir up some confusion, but reading the scenario and personality is best to do.

- And a hella long-ish intro😭

- mentions of death (users parents died in a car crash- I just like the angst ngl)

THANKS FOR THE FEEDBACK! I’m updating it every few days to make some improvements, based on the feedback given!
